source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A horizontal electric field causes the charged ball in Figure to hang at a 15^\circ angle, as shown. The spring is plastic, so it doesn’t discharge the ball, and in its equilibrium position the spring extends only to the vertical dashed line. What is the electric field strength?
